content:
Given the undirected dynamic graph with the edges:
[(2, 5, 0), (6, 9, 3), (4, 5, 5), (4, 8, 10), (1, 3, 11), (4, 9, 11), (1, 6, 13), (0, 2, 21), (1, 9, 22), (1, 8, 23), (2, 4, 23), (6, 8, 26), (5, 6, 27), (0, 8, 28), (2, 3, 28)],

We need to find the nodes linked with node 4 exactly at time 10.

We scan each edge (u, v, t) and collect the other node whenever the time t matches the queried time AND one of the nodes matches the queried node.

* Edge (2, 5, 0) has node 2 and time 0. -> Add node 5.
* Edge (6, 9, 3) has node 6 and time 3. -> Add node 9.
* Edge (4, 5, 5) has node 4 and time 5. -> Add node 5.
* Edge (4, 8, 10) has node 4 and time 10. -> Add node 8.
* Edge (1, 3, 11) has node 1 and time 11. -> Add node 3.
* Edge (4, 9, 11) has node 4 and time 11. -> Add node 9.
* Edge (1, 6, 13) has node 1 and time 13. -> Add node 6.
* Edge (0, 2, 21) has node 0 and time 21. -> Add node 2.
* Edge (1, 9, 22) has node 1 and time 22. -> Add node 9.
* Edge (1, 8, 23) has node 1 and time 23. -> Add node 8.
* Edge (2, 4, 23) has node 2 and time 23. -> Add node 4.
* Edge (6, 8, 26) has node 6 and time 26. -> Add node 8.
* Edge (5, 6, 27) has node 5 and time 27. -> Add node 6.
* Edge (0, 8, 28) has node 0 and time 28. -> Add node 8.
* Edge (2, 3, 28) has node 2 and time 28. -> Add node 3.

The nodes matched are 8, 9, and 2.

Answer: [8, 9, 2]
